scripts.start: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm exec nest start --entryFile src/main
scripts.start:dev: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm exec nest start --watch --entryFile src/main
scripts.start:prod: sh -c 'pnpm run prisma:migrate && pnpm run start:node'
scripts.port:kill: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');let p='';try{p=execSync('lsof -tiTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim().split('\\n')[0]}catch{};if(!p){console.log('No process listening on :3000');process.exit(0)};const pid=Number(p);console.log('Stopping :3000 ->',pid);try{process.kill(pid,'SIGTERM')}catch{};setTimeout(()=>{try{process.kill(pid,'SIGKILL')}catch{}},800)"
scripts.start:prod:clean: pnpm run port:kill && pnpm run start:prod
scripts.prisma:migrate: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm run prisma:generate
scripts.start:bg: sh -c 'mkdir -p .logs; rm -f .logs/api.pid .logs/runner.pid .logs/api.log .logs/migrate.log; pnpm run stop:bg >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; pnpm run port:kill >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; pnpm run prisma:migrate > .logs/migrate.log 2>&1 || { echo "Migrate failed. See .logs/migrate.log"; exit 1; }; : > .logs/api.log; nohup pnpm run start:node >> .logs/api.log 2>&1 & echo $! > .logs/runner.pid; p=""; for i in $(seq 1 120); do p=$(lsof -tiTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); if [ -n "$p" ]; then break; fi; sleep 0.25; done; if [ -n "$p" ]; then echo "$p" > .logs/api.pid; else cat .logs/runner.pid > .logs/api.pid; fi; echo "API started (bg) pid=$(cat .logs/api.pid 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; echo "Try: curl http://localhost:3000/api"'
scripts.stop:bg: sh -c 'mkdir -p .logs; pid=""; runner=""; if [ -f .logs/api.pid ]; then pid=$(cat .logs/api.pid 2>/dev/null || true); fi; if [ -f .logs/runner.pid ]; then runner=$(cat .logs/runner.pid 2>/dev/null || true); fi; for p in $pid $runner; do if [ -n "$p" ] && kill -0 "$p" 2>/dev/null; then kill -TERM "$p" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; done; sleep 0.8; for p in $pid $runner; do if [ -n "$p" ] && kill -0 "$p" 2>/dev/null; then kill -KILL "$p" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; done; rm -f .logs/api.pid .logs/runner.pid; p=$(lsof -tiTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); if [ -n "$p" ]; then echo "Also stopping port 3000 pid=$p"; kill -TERM "$p" 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 0.8; kill -KILL "$p" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; echo "Stopped API"'
scripts.status:bg: sh -c 'pid=""; runner=""; if [ -f .logs/api.pid ]; then pid=$(cat .logs/api.pid 2>/dev/null || true); fi; if [ -f .logs/runner.pid ]; then runner=$(cat .logs/runner.pid 2>/dev/null || true); fi; if [ -n "$pid" ] && kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then echo "API running pid=$pid"; elif [ -n "$pid" ]; then echo "API pid file exists but process not running (pid=$pid)"; else echo "API not running"; fi; if [ -n "$runner" ] && kill -0 "$runner" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Runner pid=$runner"; fi; p=$(lsof -tiTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); if [ -n "$p" ]; then echo "Port 3000 listening pid=$p"; fi'
